prompt: World-class graphic designer Meta Ads carousel slide. 1:1 square format, 1080x1080px equivalent, professional advertising design. COMPOSITION: Solid flat black background (#0f0f0f), zero gradients on background. TWO COLUMN LAYOUT — strict separation. LEFT COLUMN (occupies left 55% of canvas): Top-left aligned. Large bold uppercase white headline text in 3 stacked lines — '¿POR QUÉ' / 'TE CANSAS' / 'TAN RÁPIDO?' — using a heavy display font like Bebas Neue or Anton, fills the left column from near the top. Below headline: a 1px horizontal white rule line, then small clean white sans-serif text — 'Tu sistema inmune puede estar agotado.' RIGHT COLUMN (occupies right 45% of canvas): The Immunocal Azul product — a blue rectangular box with the Immunocal branding — rendered COMPLETELY AND FULLY INSIDE the right column. The ENTIRE product box is visible: all 4 corners inside the frame, top edge has at least 60px clearance from top of image, bottom edge has at least 60px clearance from bottom, right edge has at least 40px clearance from image edge, left edge stays within the right column. Product is centered vertically in the right column. Product has a vivid royal blue radial glow (#1A56DB / #3B82F6) emanating from behind it, softly illuminating the black background around it. The product is rendered in 3D perspective, slightly angled, photorealistic box. FOOTER: Thin dark grey bar at very bottom spanning full width, small white text 'IMMUNOCAL AZUL' left-aligned, small 'Immunotec' logo text right-aligned. DESIGN QUALITY: Premium, polished, high-contrast. Clean ad, no clutter. Typography: Bebas Neue style for headline. This is NOT a photograph — it is a professional digital graphic design ad composition.
negative_prompt: product cropped, product cut off, product outside frame, product bleeding edge, product partially hidden, product touching border, photorealistic background scene, people, models, lifestyle photography, gradient background, light background, blurry, low resolution, watermark, extra text, cluttered layout
